//: Pyright/Pylance config. extraPaths makes the editor resolve imports that the runtime resolves dynamically: (1) the generated protobuf stubs in api-gateway/gateway/proto (run scripts/compile-proto.sh once so they exist) — imported flat like `import training_pb2`; (2) the `conecsa_shm` and `agent` packages under os-base/ — the os-base Dockerfile installs os-base/conecsa_shm as the `conecsa_shm` package, so adding os-base/ to the path lets the editor resolve it by name with real types; (3) the three service roots so their top-level packages (`api`, `service`, `gateway`) resolve for both service code and the tests/ that import them — the runtime adds these via each pyproject's pytest `pythonpath`.
//exclude: Not walked at all. yocto/ is the vendored Poky tree — tens of thousands of Python files that make a repo-root `pyright` run exhaust the node heap and die.
//ignore: Analyzed (so imports keep their real types) but diagnostics suppressed. The *_pb2*.py files are protoc output regenerated by scripts/compile-proto.sh — their `grpc.experimental` block is not declared by the grpcio stubs, and we do not hand-edit generated code.
